input: Workplace surveillance system that detects employee emotions via webcam during meetings.

expected.notes: v0.1.5 post-v0.1.4 reviewer feedback (Claude-Code retest). Adjacent gap in the same risk class as v0.1.4 BLOCKER 3b — textbook Art 5(1)(f) workplace-emotion-recognition prohibition was silently classified as 'nothing applies' on v0.1.4 because the lexicon covered verb-form paraphrases (`infers workers emotions`) but not noun-phrase paraphrases (`surveillance system that detects emotions via webcam`). v0.1.5 adds `detects employee emotions`, `surveillance system that detects emotions`, `webcam emotion detection`, `workplace emotional surveillance`, and ~5 other entries. Medical/safety carve-out invariant unchanged. Cite: EUR-Lex Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Article 5(1)(f).
